records.ety: [L. scurrilis, fr. scurra a bufoon, jester: cf. F. scurrile.]

defs: Such as befits a buffoon or vulgar jester; grossly opprobrious or loudly jocose in language; scurrilous; as, scurrile taunts.
quotes: The wretched affectation of scurrile laughter.
A scurrile or obscene jest will better advance you at the court of Charles than your father's ancient name.
